_comment: Authoritative declaration of CC Director's cc-* tools for the Tools catalog page. Each tool gets two universal health checks (binary on PATH, --version responds) plus an optional read-only smoke command declared here. A null smoke means there is no zero-auth read-only command, so the tool is tested presence+version only - shown truthfully in the UI, never faked green. Embedded as a resource in CcDirector.Core so it is available at runtime regardless of working directory.

tools.name: cc-html
tools.description: Convert between Markdown and HTML with themes.

tools.name: cc-pdf
tools.description: Convert between Markdown and PDF with themes.

tools.name: cc-word
tools.description: Convert between Markdown and Word (.docx) with themes.

tools.name: cc-excel
tools.description: Convert between CSV, JSON, Markdown tables and formatted Excel workbooks.

tools.name: cc-powerpoint
tools.description: Generate formatted PowerPoint decks from Markdown or a spec.

tools.name: cc-docgen
tools.description: Generate architecture/C4 documentation and diagrams from source.
tools.note: Diagram generation needs Graphviz and a source tree. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-vault
tools.description: Personal contacts/secrets vault CLI. The only sanctioned way to query the vault.

tools.name: cc-settings
tools.description: Read and write CC Director config.json settings.

tools.name: cc-posthog
tools.description: PostHog analytics CLI: page views, funnels, events, recordings.
tools.note: Needs a PostHog API key. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-comm-queue
tools.description: Queue content into the Communication Manager approval workflow.

tools.name: cc-hardware
tools.description: Query system hardware information (RAM, CPU, GPU, disk, OS, network).

tools.name: cc-gmail
tools.description: Gmail CLI: read, send, search and manage email.
tools.note: Auth-gated (OAuth). No zero-auth read-only command. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-outlook
tools.description: Outlook/Microsoft 365 CLI: read, send, search email.
tools.note: Auth-gated (device code). No zero-auth read-only command. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-reddit
tools.description: Reddit CLI with human-like pacing. The only sanctioned way to drive Reddit.
tools.note: Drives a browser session. Presence + version only (no auto-launch in tests).

tools.name: cc-twitter
tools.description: Twitter/X browser automation.

tools.name: cc-facebook
tools.description: Facebook browser automation.

tools.name: cc-spotify
tools.description: Spotify browser automation: play, playlists, search.

tools.name: cc-youtube
tools.description: YouTube operations.

tools.name: cc-youtube-info
tools.description: Fetch YouTube video metadata.

tools.name: cc-image
tools.description: Image generation and manipulation.
tools.note: May call paid APIs. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-photos
tools.description: Photo library operations.

tools.name: cc-video
tools.description: Video processing operations.

tools.name: cc-transcribe
tools.description: Audio transcription CLI.
tools.note: Needs an audio input. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-whisper
tools.description: Local Whisper transcription.
tools.note: Needs an audio input + model. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-voice
tools.description: Text-to-speech / voice utilities.

tools.name: cc-crawl4ai
tools.description: AI-ready web crawler: crawl pages to clean markdown.
tools.note: Hits the network. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-personresearch
tools.description: Research a person across public sources.
tools.note: Hits the network/paid APIs. Presence + version only.

tools.name: cc-playwright
tools.description: Trusted-event browser automation via Playwright CDP with named, isolated connections.

tools.name: cc-director-setup
tools.description: First-run setup helper for CC Director.
